title: SaaS MVP Dashboard
summary: A launch-ready SaaS dashboard with onboarding, analytics, billing-ready layout, and responsive product UI.
overview: A founder-focused MVP build that turns a product idea into a usable web application with clean dashboard UX and scalable architecture.
problem: Early-stage founders need a product that looks credible, explains the idea clearly, and can be tested with real users fast.
solution: A focused MVP with authentication-ready screens, data views, settings, user flows, and a polished interface for demos and pilots.
